title: AOOS expands Alaska Native representation on board of directors
summary: This year, the Alaska Ocean Observing System is committed to enhancing Alaska Native representation on its board of directors by expanding from one to four seats. The organization is currently reaching out to leaders within Alaska Native Organizations across the state to identify interested entities...

title: Upcoming Tax Return Deadline: Raw Fish Tax Due by March 31, 2024
summary: Upcoming Tax Return Deadline: Raw Fish Tax Due by March 31, 2024 This is a friendly reminder that the deadline for filing City of Cordova Raw Fish Tax returns is March 31, 2024.
